The Consultation

Begin with a conversation.

Every transformation starts here — an unhurried, expert assessment of where you are and the smile you imagine. Choose to meet in person or by video.

At the studio

In Person

Sit chairside with Dr. Trev. A full clinical assessment, digital imaging, and a tailored plan — designed around your face, in the room where the work happens.

  • —Full clinical exam
  • —Digital imaging & scans
  • —Tailored treatment plan
$250Reserve In Person→

From anywhere

Video

A private virtual consultation by video. Share your goals and photos, and receive Dr. Trev's expert perspective and direction — wherever you are in the world.

  • —Live video with Dr. Trev
  • —Photo-based assessment
  • —Clear next steps
$250Reserve Video→

Consultations are by appointment and limited each month.

An atelier of cosmetic & implant dentistry by Dr. Trevor J. Thomas, DDS.
